race.comment: AUTUMN HEIR (2) had gotten better with each run this campaign and that culminated with a strong victory over this track and trip last time out. Goes well for rider Osmond who has a win and two placings from just three steers and again gets the benefit of his 1.5kg claim. Should prove very hard to hold out. KALKANLI (4) is knocking on the door of another win with consecutive runner-up finishes over this course and distance and should give backers a sight up on speed. Include in calculations. FORTY TIMES (3) got the job done at the Sunny Coast last time around and looks ready for the step-up in trip now. Likely to feature prominently. PROPOSE (5) hasn't been disgraced in town at the past few efforts and will find this a touch more to her liking. In the mix. BRIGHT THE SUN (12) best of the rest.
